title: Dark Angel sets opponent AL and SPD to one

card.rawText: While this card is on the field, your opponents' creatures' AL and SPD are reduced to 1, and cannot be increased.

effect.value: While this card is on the field, your opponents' creatures' AL and SPD are reduced to 1, and cannot be increased.
